title: LLM4HLS directive DSE
route: Use for pragma/directive search after functional correctness, especially when Pareto PPA trade-offs matter.
summary: Treat directives as a structured design space; propose few candidate pragma changes, explain the expected PPA movement, and evaluate under budget.
anti_patterns: do not add directives that conflict with code dependencies
do not optimize failed functional code
risk: LLM directive proposals need tool validation.
